series_metadata.series_description: All records which documents are the basis for a payroll (e.g., report; activity sheets; time cards; overtime; compensation time; flextime authorization; sign-in sheets; OHP 0166, HP-29 OSHP Duty Assignment, bid schedules).

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until audit has been conducted. Once audit results have been received from the State Auditors Office, notification will be sent as to which dates are to be destroyed. ; Paper: Retain until audit has been conducted. Once audit results have been received from the State Auditors Office, notification will be sent as to which dates are to be destroyed., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
